ab: ulraya i emu na babayan i ruma?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ulraya, ulraya i kiyaedrengan alrupe.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: ulraya i emu na babayan i ruma?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: uniyan, mupatraran a garemay. uwaruma an aremeng lra.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: ulraya i emu na mainayan i ruma?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: ulraya kana pukadruwa tadrar. uwa ayau i makasatr.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧！
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: ulraya a trau i ruma?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: i Minuru a! paetreng ku lra adri menau kanu. inaba yu driya?
ch: B:是Minuru啊！很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎？
en: It’s Minuru. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: aiwa! inaba ku driya! druwa ku mayaa kanu madradrayara.
ch: A:是啊！我很好！我來找你聊天。
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: ulraya isuwa i temama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: ulraya i sawka meriyangering dra irupan. kayku rengayaw i namalri.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫(告訴)爸爸。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: muka isuwa i Tiwa?
en: Where did Tiwa go?

ab: muka i puwaterekukan dremimutra dra terekuk.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: emu, druwa mi lra.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: uniyan i temuu na mainayan. muka i uma. ngarayu driya i ruma i!
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他去田裡，你們在家等他吧！
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: ina, druwa yu lra!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: paetreng ta lra adri menau kanu. asatr yu lra.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: salaw ta semangal dranu iyadruwa!
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: a baberay kanemu idri na pangudralr. retraan i palralritekan.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: paetreng yu lra adri druwa. mukasaya ta mekan i!
ch: A:這麼久沒來，跟大家一起來吃飯吧！
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: adri kabangabang. tremekela ku dra kulisapa. kayta i kalawalawayan madradrayara.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: semangalan dramu iyalubis. uwaburek ku lra.
ch: A:謝謝你們的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: a trinuwak a garemay idri na terekuk. kasuyu muruma! patawari lra mekan.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
